name: ember-toolkit
description: Sara LaFleur's source-of-truth marketplace for her Claude Code skills and agents, grouped into installable plugins.

plugins.name: delivery-team
plugins.description: Five virtual delivery teams (intake, qa, build, release, status) that run a request through plan -> test -> build -> release, plus a read-only status reconciler.

plugins.name: librarian
plugins.description: The team librarian — curates durable knowledge into a shared, growing library so repeat work approaches one-shot. Organizes knowledge by domain/subdomain/topic with retrieval descriptions, keeps a single Table of Contents, audits its own descriptions and itself for thrashing, and gates every write behind human approval.
